mapper.select: SELECT * FROM book ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM book WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book (title, author, publisher, isbn, category, description, `status`, create_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{author}, #{publisher}, #{isbn}, #{category}, #{description}, #{status}, #{createTime})
